statement.headerDoc:
STEP Frankl — Union-closed sets conjecture small-family verification
  =====================================================================

  Frankl's Conjecture (1979, OPEN 47 years):
    If F is a finite family of finite sets with |F| ≥ 2, closed under union
    (A, B ∈ F ⟹ A ∪ B ∈ F), then there exists an element x such that x
    appears in at least |F|/2 sets of F.

  Best known lower bound (Alweiss-Huang-Sellke, Chase-Lovett, 2022-23):
    ≈ 0.38234. Full 0.5 is OPEN.

  Rei empirical sweep (scripts/frankl-union-closed-rei-lens.ts, G=4):
    - Enumerated 4,429 union-closed families ove
